title: Midjourney Advanced
description: Advanced techniques and settings for engineers using Midjourney for image generation.

commands.description: Use version 5 of the Midjourney model for improved image quality.
commands.scenario: When generating high-quality images for a professional project.

commands.description: Set the aspect ratio of the generated image to 16:9.
commands.scenario: When creating images for widescreen displays or presentations.

commands.description: Exclude water elements from the image generation.
commands.scenario: When generating images that should not contain water elements.

commands.description: Increase the randomness and variety in the generated images.
commands.scenario: When exploring creative variations and unexpected outcomes.

commands.description: Double the rendering quality of the generated image.
commands.scenario: When the highest possible image quality is required for print.

commands.description: Set a specific seed for reproducible image generation.
commands.scenario: When needing consistent outputs for A/B testing or comparisons.

commands.description: Apply a specific artistic style to the generated image.
commands.scenario: When matching the image style to a specific artistic direction.

commands.description: Use a lighter version of the upscale algorithm for faster results.
commands.scenario: When needing quick results with reasonable quality.

commands.description: Generate images that can be seamlessly tiled.
commands.scenario: When creating textures or patterns for backgrounds.

commands.description: Set the aspect ratio to 1:1 for square images.
commands.scenario: When creating images for social media platforms like Instagram.

commands.description: Switch to a faster rendering mode at the expense of quality.
commands.scenario: When speed is more critical than image quality.

commands.description: Stop the image generation process at 50% completion.
commands.scenario: When needing a rough draft or preview quickly.

commands.description: Adjusts how strongly Midjourney applies its default artistic training. Higher values increase aesthetic flair but may deviate from prompt literalism.
Introduces unconventional, quirky, or offbeat aesthetics to the generation process to break standard AI patterns.
Image Weight parameter used in image prompting to control the influence of the reference image relative to the text prompt.
Reverse engineering tool: upload an image to receive four text prompt suggestions that would generate similar results.
Batch execution command to run the same prompt multiple times, useful for large-scale dataset generation and sampling.
